Uses of Class
in.co.rays.proj4.bean.BaseBean

Packages that use BaseBean
Package
Description
in.co.rays.proj4.bean
 
in.co.rays.proj4.controller
 
in.co.rays.proj4.util
 

  • Uses of BaseBean in in.co.rays.proj4.bean

    Subclasses of BaseBean in in.co.rays.proj4.bean
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CollegeBean
    CollegeBean represents a College entity containing college-related information such as name, address, state, city, and phone number.
    class 
    CourseBean
    CourseBean class contains Course information.
    class 
    FacultyBean
    FacultyBean class contains faculty information.
    class 
    MarksheetBean
    MarksheetBean class contains student marksheet information.
    class 
    RoleBean
    RoleBean class contains role information.
    class 
    StudentBean
    StudentBean class contains student information.
    class 
    SubjectBean
    SubjectBean class contains subject information.
    class 
    SystemsBean
    SystemsBean class is used as a Bean/DTO to store system event information such as event code, event name, and event status.
    class 
    TimetableBean
    TimetableBean class is used as a Bean/DTO to store timetable and examination details such as semester, description, exam date, exam time, course details, and subject details.
    class 
    UserBean
    UserBean class is used as a Bean/DTO to store user-related information such as personal details, login credentials, role information, and contact details.

  • Uses of BaseBean in in.co.rays.proj4.controller

    Methods in in.co.rays.proj4.controller that return BaseBean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected BaseBean
    BaseCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates request data into bean object.
    protected BaseBean
    ChangePasswordCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates request data into UserBean object.
    protected BaseBean
    CollegeCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates request data into CollegeBean.
    protected BaseBean
    CollegeListCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates request data into CollegeBean.
    protected BaseBean
    CourseCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates request data into CourseBean.
    protected BaseBean
    CourseListCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the CourseBean object with data retrieved from the request parameters submitted by the user.
    protected BaseBean
    FacultyCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the FacultyBean object with data extracted from the HTML form fields.
    protected BaseBean
    FacultyListCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the FacultyBean object with filtering parameters sent by the user from the list view search criteria.
    protected BaseBean
    ForgetPasswordCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the UserBean object with the login credentials submitted by the user.
    protected BaseBean
    GetMarksheetCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the MarksheetBean object with the Roll Number parameter requested by the user.
    protected BaseBean
    LoginCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the UserBean data container object using raw input details taken from request elements.
    protected BaseBean
    MarksheetCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the MarksheetBean data transfer object using structural attributes extracted from user request parameters.
    protected BaseBean
    MarksheetListCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the MarksheetBean object with filtering parameters sent by the user from the list view search criteria fields.
    protected BaseBean
    MyProfileCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the UserBean context object data wrapper fields using matching input values retrieved from the request parameter map.
    protected BaseBean
    RoleCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the RoleBean data entity object container using structural request parameters.
    protected BaseBean
    RoleListCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the RoleBean data entity container with structural criteria parameters passed by the client for targeted data searching workflows.
    protected BaseBean
    StudentCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the StudentBean context data transfer object instance using transformed values harvested from user request parameters.
    protected BaseBean
    StudentListCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the StudentBean object with filtering parameters sent by the user from the student list view search criteria fields.
    protected BaseBean
    TimetableCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Extracts parameters from request contexts to populate an integrated instance of TimetableBean.
    protected BaseBean
    TimetableListCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the TimetableBean object with specific search constraints such as selected courseId, subjectId, and examDate parameters from the list search view.
    protected BaseBean
    UserCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the UserBean data container object using parsed input properties collected from the transaction request context.
    protected BaseBean
    UserListCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates the UserBean object with specific criteria properties extracted from the request context for targeted query filtering workflows.
    protected BaseBean
    UserRegistrationCtl.populateBean(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Extracts structural request parameters to assemble a transaction-ready UserBean object instance, forcing default Student authorization privileges.
    protected BaseBean
    BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean dto, javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request)
    Populates common DTO fields such as createdBy, modifiedBy, createdDatetime, and modifiedDatetime.
